final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing advertisement for a premium beauty product (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "奢华精致" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Tom Ford Beauty campaign photography, La Mer product editorial, Dior J'adore campaign visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a serum bottle with glass body showing pale golden liquid (one), rose petals, water droplets splashing around
Scene/backdrop: must include soft pink gradient background
Lighting/mood: needs a soft and natural light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink dominant with pale golden accents
Materials/textures: must include glass transparency, liquid sheen, petal softness, water droplet clarity
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
